# RANKING MATTERS - LOCAL SEO AGENCY

## SUMMARY
Ranking Matters is a performance-driven Local SEO and digital optimization agency specializing in helping local businesses claim the #1 spot on Google Maps. We transform Google Business Profiles into high-converting lead generation machines.

## CORE SERVICES

### Google Business Profile Optimization
Complete structural builds and monthly optimization mechanics designed to securely place your profile into the coveted Google 3-Pack.
- Keyword Category Structuring
- Geo-Targeted Asset Stacking
- Continuous Audit Maintenance

### GMB Suspension & Recovery
Emergency restoration services for suspended Google Business Profile accounts.
- Contamination Data Cleanup
- Address & Document Auditing
- Direct Google Support Pipeline
- 72-hour reinstatement guarantee

### Local Citation Engineering
Building tier-1 business citations while fixing historical NAP (Name, Address, Phone) variations.
- Aggressive Inconsistent NAP Cleanup
- Premium Local Network Placement
- Hyper-Localized Backlink Auditing

### Google Maps Ranking
Advanced georadial mapping and proximity optimization for top Google Maps positions.
- Georadial Mapping
- Proximity Optimization
- Multi-Location Strategy

### Google Maps Marketing
Strategic Google Maps marketing to drive targeted traffic and generate leads.
- Review Generation Strategy
- Photo & Video Optimization
- Google Posts Management

### Landing Page Design
Custom-designed hyper-local landing pages optimized for conversion.
- Conversion-Focused Design
- Schema Markup Implementation
- Mobile-Responsive & Fast

## PRIMARY INDUSTRIES
- HVAC & Mechanical
- Emergency Plumbing
- Home Contracting & Roofing
- Premium Bridal Studios
- Commercial Janitorial Services
- Real Estate Brokerages

### Local Spark - ₨ 50,000/mo
- Google Business Profile Setup
- Targeted Core Citation Building
- Standard Geo-Tag Asset Postings

- Advanced Georadial Mapping
- Tailored Local Schema Deployment
- Deep Tier-1 Citation Cleanup
- Suspension Guard Monitoring

### Enterprise Market Takeover - ₨ 90,000/mo
- Multi-Profile Network Structuring
- High-Stakes Priority Support Line
- Custom Organic Landing Pages
- Premium Dedicated Link Campaign

## TECHNICAL EXPERTISE
- GMB Troubleshooting & Verification: 98%
- Georadial Proximity Optimization: 95%
- Local JSON-LD Semantic Web: 92%
- Directory Data Remediation: 96%

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: What causes GMB suspensions?
A: Aggressive name changes (keyword stuffing), address changes to unverified locations, data mismatch across directories, or system sweeps targeting specific local service categories.

Q: How do you improve Google Maps ranking?
A: By building geo-contextual relevance through structured backend coordinates, locally optimized landing page networks, nested schema configurations, and hyper-targeted contextual link profiles.

Q: Do you require long-term contracts?
A: No, all campaigns run on flexible month-to-month commitments based on transparent performance and verifiable ROI.

Q: How long does GMB suspension recovery take?
A: Our specialists can typically get your profile reinstated within 72 hours.
